title: Shared Contract Layer
purpose: Establish src/shared/contracts/ as the single source of truth for data shapes consumed by both backend and frontend. Migrate existing Zod schemas from backend DTOs to shared contracts.
architectural_constraints: Contracts must include Zod schema + TypeScript type + example

deliverables.description: Public exports for all shared contracts
User Zod schema, type, and example
Profile Zod schema, type, and example
Listing Zod schema, type, and example
Search result Zod schema, type, and example
Updated to import from shared/contracts instead of local definitions

acceptance_criteria: Both backend and frontend compile using shared contracts
No duplicate Zod schemas exist in backend DTOs
All contract files export schema + type + example
Frontend can import and use contracts without type errors
npm run typecheck passes across all surfaces

failure_modes.mitigation: Flat contract structure; no cross-contract imports

failure_modes.scenario: Frontend needs type not yet in contracts
failure_modes.mitigation: Backend adds type to contracts; no frontend-only types
